title: pseudognaphalium selleanum
intro: Pseudognaphalium selleanum, also known as Sello's cudweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium selleanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and heal wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, Pseudognaphalium selleanum is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
